ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: White Chocolate (70%) [sugar, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, emulsifier: soy lecithin, natural vanilla flavour], Roasted Macadamia Nuts (12%), Cocoa Crumb (13%) [flour (wheat, maize), sugar, cocoa powder, butter, salt], Honey Roasted Macadamia Nuts (5%) [macadamias, sugar, honey, tapioca].
